economic_notes: First Nation holds investments in multiple partnerships and business entities including Squiala Investment Holdings LP, Squiala Holdings LP, Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP, Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe LP, Centre Creek LP, and others. Eagle Landing Development Limited Partnership lease generates significant deferred revenue ($15M+). COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact.
notes: Auditor name not extractable from provided text. Eight entities accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs), not consolidated. Deferred revenue of $15M relates to Eagle Landing Development LP lease - significantly affects balance sheet. expenses_social is combined Social Programs ($422,198) + Social Development ($320,802) = $742,000. Capital Projects expenses ($359,729) not mapped to a standard category. Investments segment expenses ($195,881) included in enterprises. net_financial_assets is end of year actual figure. tangible_capital_assets derived from equity in tangible capital assets component of accumulated surplus ($10,659,476). annual_debt_service is principal repaid on long-term debt during year ($51,366). total_government_transfers includes ISC ($2,308,322) + FNESC ($230,342) + CMHC ($25,723) + Sto:lo Nation ($7,080) = $2,671,467; osr = $6,324,515 - $2,671,467 = $3,653,048.
